panels.title: Recent events
panels.description: Most recent events (newest first). Filter with the Distinct ID and City variables; choose columns with the Fields variable. Column headers are also filterable.

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    event,
    distinct_id,
    city,
    region,
    os,
    os_version,
    model,
    manufacturer,
    device_id,
    carrier,
    lib_version,
    radio,
    wifi,
    screen_width,
    screen_height,
    user_id,
    app_version_string,
    app_build_number,
    had_persisted_distinct_id,
    mp_country_code,
    mp_lib,
    mp_processing_time_ms,
    mp_event_size,
    properties
  FROM $__table
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND (properties IS NULL OR LENGTH(properties) <= 2000)
    AND ('(all)' IN (${distinct_id}) OR distinct_id IN (${distinct_id}))
    AND ('(all)' IN (${city}) OR city IN (${city}))
)
SELECT ${fields:doublequote} FROM base ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 500

list.name: distinct_id
list.label: Distinct ID
list.description: Filter events by one or more app installations (distinct_id). Leave '(all)' selected for no filter.
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT v AS distinct_id FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT '(all)' AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT distinct_id AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND distinct_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY v
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT v AS distinct_id FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT '(all)' AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT distinct_id AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND distinct_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY v

list.name: city
list.label: City
list.description: Filter events by Mixpanel-derived city. Leave '(all)' selected for no filter. (Currently every event has a null city.)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT v AS city FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT '(all)' AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT city AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND city IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY v
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT v AS city FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT '(all)' AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT city AS v FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND city IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY v

list.name: fields
list.label: Fields
list.description: Choose which columns to show. These are the standard event fields captured for every project.
list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT field FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT 'time' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'event' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'distinct_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'city' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'region' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'os' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'os_version' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'model' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'manufacturer' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'device_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'carrier' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'lib_version' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'radio' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'wifi' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'screen_width' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'screen_height' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'user_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'app_version_string' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'app_build_number' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'had_persisted_distinct_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_country_code' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_lib' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_processing_time_ms' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_event_size' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'properties' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
) WHERE field NOT LIKE '$%' ORDER BY field
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT field FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT 'time' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'event' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'os' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'carrier' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'lib_version' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'radio' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'wifi' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'screen_width' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'screen_height' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'user_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'app_version_string' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'app_build_number' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'had_persisted_distinct_id' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_country_code' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_lib' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_processing_time_ms' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'mp_event_size' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'properties' AS field FROM $__table WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
) WHERE field NOT LIKE '$%' ORDER BY field
